title: Check
description:
Represents a single check within an order.

The `externalId` value for a check must be unique. If you submit a check
with an `externalId` that already exists for another check, the request
will fail. You can use this behavior to implement idempotent check
submission by always providing a consistent `externalId` for each unique
check attempt.

createdDate.description: The date and time that the Toast platform received the check.

openedDate.description: The date on which this check was opened. If not specified, it is set to the current system time.

closedDate.description: The most recent date on which this check's payment status was set to `CLOSED`.

modifiedDate.description: The most recent date on which this check was modified.

deletedDate.description:
The date on which this check was deleted.

`deletedDate` is only applicable when `deleted` is true.

If `deleted` is false, then `deletedDate` is set to the UNIX epoch, `1970-01-01T00:00:00.000+0000`.

deleted.description: Set to `true` if this check was deleted.

customer.description:
A `Customer` object
that holds information about a restaurant guest
that is associated with the check.

Required for `POST` requests for orders that use the
takeout or delivery dining options.

For checks that apply or accrue Toast loyalty points, a
`GET` request returns a `Customer` object
even when restaurant employees do not enter guest
information for a check. In this case, the `Customer` object
contains only the Toast platform GUID of the guest.
All other values are `null`.

appliedLoyaltyInfo.description: Information about the customer loyalty program account associated with the check. Used to accrue loyalty program benefits and to redeem loyalty program discounts.

taxExempt.description: Set to `true` if this check is tax exempt.

displayNumber.description: Generally starts at one each day and counts up. The Toast platform fills this in if it is not specified when the order is POSTed. Not guaranteed to be unique.

appliedServiceCharges.description: Any restaurant-configured service charges that applied to this check.

amount.description: The total calculated price of the check including discounts and service charges. The `amount` does not include gratuity or taxes. Response only.

taxAmount.description: The calculated tax amount. Includes service charge and item level taxes. Response only.

totalAmount.description: The total calculated price of this check including discounts and taxes. Not affected by refunds.

tabName.description:
The name of the tab on this check. This displays on the KDS (Kitchen Display System) for pending orders.

The `tabName` value can contain up to 255 characters.

paymentStatus.description:
The payment status of this check.

Valid values:

* `OPEN` - There is an outstanding balance.

* `PAID` - A credit card payment was applied, but the tip has not been adjusted.

* `CLOSED`  - There is no remaining amount due on this check. For credit card payments, the payment has been adjusted to reflect the tip. Toast does not prevent a `CLOSED` check from transitioning back to `OPEN` or `PAID`.

Response only.

appliedDiscounts.description: The discounts applied to this check. In a `POST` request, only one `appliedDiscount` is allowed per check.

voided.description: True if this check is voided. Response only.

voidDate.description: The date when this check was voided. Response only.

voidBusinessDate.description: The business date (yyyyMMdd) on which this check was voided. Response only.

paidDate.description: The most recent date when this check received payment. If not specified when `POST`ing, it is set to the current system time.

createdDevice.description: The Toast POS device that created the check. This value is `null` if the check was not created using a Toast POS device.

lastModifiedDevice.description:
The Toast POS device that modified the check most recently. This value is `null` if the check was never modified using a Toast POS device.

If the check is modified but the modification was not made using a Toast POS device, then this value does not change.

duration.description: The number of seconds between creation and payment. Response only.

openedBy.description: The restaurant employee, or server, who opened the check.
